subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, transcending all bounds of time and space and exalted above mention of the realms of being and non-being, befitteth that Beloved One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از حدود زمان و مکان و منزه از ذکر امکان و لامکان محبوبی را لایق و
subcodes.subjects: @work as worship, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Word of God the cause of creation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @living waters; water of life
